tasks.title: Initialize Astro 5.x Project with pnpm
tasks.description: Set up the base Astro project structure with TypeScript strict mode and required dependencies.
tasks.details: Run `pnpm create astro@latest . -- --template minimal --typescript strict`; Add dependencies: `pnpm add astro@^5.0.0 @astrojs/sitemap @tailwindcss/vite tailwindcss@^4.0.0 typescript`; Create package.json scripts: 'dev': 'astro dev', 'build': 'astro build', 'preview': 'astro preview'; Initialize git repo.
tasks.testStrategy: Run `pnpm install` and `pnpm dev` to verify server starts without errors; Check TypeScript compilation with `pnpm build`.

tasks.title: Configure astro.config.ts with Site and Integrations
tasks.description: Set up Astro configuration with site URL, sitemap integration, and TailwindCSS Vite plugin.
tasks.details: Create astro.config.ts: import { defineConfig } from 'astro/config'; import sitemap from '@astrojs/sitemap'; import tailwind from '@tailwindcss/vite'; export default defineConfig({ site: 'https://cursorsaudi.com', integrations: [sitemap()], vite: { plugins: [tailwind()] } });
tasks.testStrategy: Run `pnpm dev` and verify config loads without errors; Check build generates sitemap.xml.

tasks.title: Setup TypeScript Strict Configuration
tasks.description: Configure tsconfig.json with strict mode and path aliases.
tasks.details: Create tsconfig.json extending 'astro/tsconfigs/strict': { 'extends': 'astro/tsconfigs/strict', 'compilerOptions': { 'baseUrl': '.', 'paths': { '@/*': ['./src/*'] } }, 'include': ['src'], 'exclude': ['node_modules', 'dist'] }; Create src/env.d.ts with Astro types.
tasks.testStrategy: Run `pnpm build` to ensure TypeScript strict mode passes; Verify path alias @/ works in editor.

tasks.title: Create Site Configuration Module
tasks.description: Define src/config.ts as single source of truth for metadata and social links.
tasks.details: export const config = { title: 'Cursor Saudi', description: 'Cursor Saudi Community', author: 'Cursor Saudi', social: { luma: 'https://lu.ma/...', twitter: 'https://x.com/cursorsaudi' } } as const;
tasks.testStrategy: Import config in a test .astro file and verify IntelliSense/type checking works.

tasks.title: Configure Tailwind CSS v4 Global Styles
tasks.description: Setup Tailwind CSS v4 with dark-mode-only theme and custom colors/fonts.
tasks.details: Create src/styles/global.css: @import 'tailwindcss'; :root { --bg: #0d1117; --surface: #161b22; --border: #30363d; --text-primary: #e6edf3; --text-secondary: #8b949e; --accent: #58a6ff; --accent-hover: #79c0ff; } @font-face { font-family: 'Noto Kufi Arabic'; } @font-face { font-family: 'Inter'; }
tasks.testStrategy: Apply Tailwind classes in a test component and verify custom colors/fonts render correctly.

tasks.title: Implement i18n Translation System
tasks.description: Create Arabic/English translation files and getTranslation utility.
tasks.details: Create src/i18n/ar.json and en.json with keys: hero.title, hero.description, events.upcoming, events.past, etc.; Create src/i18n/index.ts: export function getTranslation(lang: 'ar' | 'en', key: string) { return i18n[lang]?.[key] || key; }
tasks.testStrategy: Create test component using getTranslation() and verify both languages return correct strings.

tasks.title: Create Language Detection Script
tasks.description: Implement public/toggle-lang.js to prevent FOUC and set html lang/dir from localStorage.
tasks.details: Create public/toggle-lang.js: (function() { const lang = localStorage.getItem('lang') || 'ar'; const html = document.documentElement; html.lang = lang; html.dir = lang === 'ar' ? 'rtl' : 'ltr'; html.classList.add('dark'); })();
tasks.testStrategy: Load page, check localStorage 'lang', verify html lang/dir attributes match; Test persistence across refreshes.

tasks.title: Define Events Content Collection Schema
tasks.description: Setup Zod-validated events collection with required frontmatter schema.
tasks.details: Create src/content.config.ts: import { z, defineCollection } from 'astro:content'; const events = defineCollection({ schema: z.object({ title: z.string(), titleAr: z.string(), date: z.date(), location: z.string(), locationAr: z.string(), attendees: z.number().optional(), host: z.string().optional(), lumaUrl: z.string().optional(), description: z.string(), descriptionAr: z.string(), isPast: z.boolean() }) }); export const collections = { events };
tasks.testStrategy: Create sample .md file in src/content/events/ and verify schema validation passes/fails correctly.

tasks.title: Create Event Utility Functions
tasks.description: Implement getSortedEvents, getUpcomingEvents, getPastEvents helpers.
tasks.details: Create src/utils/events.ts: import { getCollection } from 'astro:content'; export async function getSortedEvents() { const events = await getCollection('events'); return events.sort((a,b) => a.data.date.getTime() - b.data.date.getTime()); } export async function getUpcomingEvents() { return (await getSortedEvents()).filter(e => !e.data.isPast); } export async function getPastEvents() { return (await getSortedEvents()).filter(e => e.data.isPast).reverse(); }
tasks.testStrategy: Create test page importing utils and verify returns correct filtered/sorted arrays.

tasks.title: Create Sample Event Content Files
tasks.description: Add 2 sample Markdown event files in src/content/events/.
tasks.details: Create src/content/events/event1.md and event2.md with frontmatter matching schema: one upcoming (isPast: false), one past (isPast: true) with attendees/host data.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify both files validate against schema and utils return them in correct sections.

tasks.title: Build Base Layout Component
tasks.description: Create Layout.astro with meta tags, Google Fonts, toggle-lang.js, and dynamic lang/dir.
tasks.details: Create src/layouts/Layout.astro with <html dir={lang === 'ar' ? 'rtl' : 'ltr'} lang={lang} class='dark'>; Include Google Fonts: Noto Kufi Arabic & Inter; Inline toggle-lang.js script; Import global.css; Standard meta/OG tags from config.
tasks.testStrategy: Use layout in test page, verify fonts load, lang/dir switch, no FOUC.

tasks.title: Develop Header Component
tasks.description: Create responsive Header.astro with bilingual branding and LangToggle.
tasks.details: Create src/components/Header.astro: Logo 'Cursor Saudi | المجتمع'; Include LangToggle; Sticky positioning; Responsive mobile hamburger if needed.
tasks.testStrategy: Test header renders in both languages, responsive breakpoints work.

tasks.title: Build Language Toggle Component
tasks.description: Create client-side LangToggle.astro with localStorage persistence.
tasks.details: Create src/components/LangToggle.astro: Button shows current lang (AR/EN); onclick: toggle localStorage 'lang', window.location.reload(); Visual active state.
tasks.testStrategy: Click toggle, verify localStorage updates, page reloads with new lang/dir.

tasks.title: Create Reusable EventCard Component
tasks.description: Build EventCard.astro accepting event props with conditional rendering.
tasks.details: Create src/components/EventCard.astro: Props interface EventData; Conditional: if !isPast show lumaUrl button, else show attendees/host; Use surface #161b22 bg, #30363d border; Responsive grid card.
tasks.testStrategy: Test with upcoming and past event props, verify conditional content renders.

tasks.title: Implement Hero Section
tasks.description: Create Hero.astro with bilingual community tagline and CTA.
tasks.details: Create src/components/Hero.astro: Use getTranslation for tagline/description; CTA links to first upcoming event lumaUrl or scrolls to upcoming section; Prominent accent colors.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify bilingual text switches, CTA links correctly to event or section.

tasks.title: Build Events Sections and Homepage
tasks.description: Create UpcomingEvents.astro, PastEvents.astro, Footer.astro, and assemble index.astro.
tasks.details: UpcomingEvents: getUpcomingEvents(), map EventCard or 'No events'; PastEvents: getPastEvents(), map EventCard; Footer: social links from config, © 2026 bilingual; index.astro: Layout > Header > Hero > Upcoming > Past > Footer.
tasks.testStrategy: Load homepage, verify all sections render with sample data, bilingual switching works.

tasks.title: Setup Static Assets and Public Files
tasks.description: Create public/ files: .nojekyll, CNAME, favicon.svg.
tasks.details: public/.nojekyll (empty); public/CNAME with 'cursorsaudi.com'; public/favicon.svg with simple Cursor Saudi icon.
tasks.testStrategy: Build site, verify files appear in dist/, favicon loads in browser.

tasks.title: Configure GitHub Actions Deployment
tasks.description: Create .github/workflows/deploy.yml for GitHub Pages.
tasks.details: Standard GH Pages workflow: on: [push, workflow_dispatch]; permissions; jobs: build (pnpm install/build, upload artifact), deploy (actions/deploy-pages@v4); Node v20, pnpm v9 cache.
tasks.testStrategy: Run workflow manually, verify deploys to gh-pages branch successfully.

tasks.title: Final Verification and Polish
tasks.description: Comprehensive testing of build, RTL/LTR, events, toggle, responsive design.
tasks.details: Run `pnpm build && pnpm preview`; Test Arabic RTL vs English LTR; Verify event filtering/sorting; Language toggle persistence; Mobile responsiveness (375px-1920px); Lighthouse audit.
tasks.testStrategy: Checklist: build succeeds, no console errors, all interactive elements work, bilingual content correct, responsive across devices.

tasks.title: Update Event Content Collection Schema
tasks.description: Modify src/content.config.ts to match Notion CSV fields: add type, speakers, slides, place; remove isPast, attendees, host; make titleAr, locationAr, descriptionAr optional.
tasks.details: In src/content.config.ts, update the events schema using Zod: add `type: z.enum(['meetup', 'hackathon', 'workshop'])`, `speakers: z.array(z.string()).optional()`, `slides: z.array(z.string()).optional()`, `place: z.string().optional()`. Remove `isPast`, `attendees`, `host`. Change `titleAr`, `locationAr`, `descriptionAr` to `.optional()`. Keep `title`, `date`, `location`, `description` required, `lumaUrl` optional. Ensure schema validates correctly.
tasks.testStrategy: Run `pnpm dev` and verify no schema validation errors on existing sample files. Manually create a test event MD with new fields and confirm it loads without errors.

tasks.title: Update Event Utility Functions
tasks.description: Update src/utils/events.ts to remove isPast filtering and implement getUpcomingEvents() and getPastEvents() using current date at build time.
tasks.details: In src/utils/events.ts, remove any `isPast` references. Implement `getUpcomingEvents()`: filter events where `event.data.date >= new Date()`, sort by date ascending. `getPastEvents()`: filter `event.data.date < new Date()`, sort descending. Use `new Date()` for build-time comparison. Export both functions.
tasks.testStrategy: Add console.log to verify filtering logic with sample dates. Run `pnpm build` and check console output shows correct past/upcoming split based on current date (Feb 10, 2026).

tasks.title: Add Ambassadors to Site Config
tasks.description: Add ambassadors array to src/config.ts with the two specified ambassadors.
tasks.details: In src/config.ts, add: `ambassadors: [{ name: "Mazen Alotaibi", city: "Riyadh", cityAr: "الرياض", twitter: "https://x.com/ma7dev" }, { name: "Abdulhakeem Almidan", city: "Khobar", cityAr: "الخبر", twitter: "https://x.com/abdulhakeem_mdn" }]` as an exported property.
tasks.testStrategy: Import and log config.ambassadors in a test page, verify array contains exactly 2 objects with correct data.

tasks.title: Create Markdown Files for 7 Past Events
tasks.description: Convert first 7 past events from CSV description to MD files in src/data/events/ with proper frontmatter.
tasks.details: Create files like `2025-05-28-kickoff-riyadh.md` with frontmatter: title, date (ISO format), location, description (from PRD or CSV), type, speakers array, slides array (full URLs), place if available. Use slugify for filenames: `${date}-${slug(title)}-${city}.md`. Ensure YAML frontmatter validates against updated schema.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify 7 files exist with correct filenames. Load site and confirm past events section shows these 7 with speakers/slides rendering.

tasks.title: Create Markdown Files for 10 Upcoming Events
tasks.description: Convert 10 upcoming events from CSV description to MD files in src/data/events/.
tasks.details: Create files for events 8-17 (Mar 2026-Nov 2026) following same format as task 23. Include lumaUrl if available from CSV. Use current date Feb 10, 2026 as cutoff - all these should be upcoming.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify 10 files exist. Check upcoming events section shows exactly 10 events post-build.

tasks.title: Update EventCard Component for New Fields
tasks.description: Modify src/components/EventCard.astro to display type badge, speakers, slides; remove attendees/host.
tasks.details: In EventCard.astro: Add type badge with colors (e.g., meetup:blue, hackathon:orange, workshop:green). If speakers, render as list. If slides and isPast, show 'Slides' links. Remove attendees/host references. Keep lumaUrl button for upcoming only. Use Astro slots or conditionals.
tasks.testStrategy: Create test page with events having all new fields. Verify badges, speakers, slides render correctly; no errors for missing fields.

tasks.title: Clean Up Samples and Final Verification
tasks.description: Delete sample events, verify all 17 real events load, run full build validation.
tasks.details: Delete all existing sample MD files in src/data/events/. Ensure exactly 17 real event files present. Run `pnpm build` - verify no schema errors, upcoming shows 10 events, past shows 7. Test bilingual toggle, type badges, speakers, slides display.
tasks.testStrategy: Post-build: Check console/build output clean. Visit /events - verify 10 upcoming + 7 past totals, all new fields render, Arabic toggle works (even if empty).
